mapper.select:
select a.id, a.title, cast(a.content as char) as content, a.scope_type, cast(a.scope_payload as char) as scope_payload, a.publish_status, a.publish_time, a.expire_time, a.deleted, a.created_by, a.created_at, a.updated_by, a.updated_at,
case when ar.id is null then 0 else 1 end
0
as is_read from announcement a
left join announcement_read ar on ar.announcement_id = a.id and ar.user_id = #{userId}
where
order by a.publish_time desc, a.id desc

select a.id, a.title, cast(a.content as char) as content, a.scope_type, cast(a.scope_payload as char) as scope_payload, a.publish_status, a.publish_time, a.expire_time, a.deleted, a.created_by, a.created_at, a.updated_by, a.updated_at,
case when ar.id is null then 0 else 1 end
0
as is_read from announcement a
left join announcement_read ar on ar.announcement_id = a.id and ar.user_id = #{userId}
where a.id = #{id} and limit 1

select count(1) from announcement a where
and not exists ( select 1 from announcement_read ar where ar.announcement_id = a.id and ar.user_id = #{userId} )

select a.id, a.title, cast(a.content as char) as content, a.scope_type, cast(a.scope_payload as char) as scope_payload, a.publish_status, a.publish_time, a.expire_time, a.deleted, a.created_by, a.created_at, a.updated_by, a.updated_at, 0 as is_read from announcement a where a.id = #{id} and a.deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into announcement
title, content, scope_type, scope_payload, publish_status, publish_time, expire_time, deleted, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at,
#{title}, #{content}, #{scopeType}, #{scopePayload}, #{publishStatus}, #{publishTime}, #{expireTime}, #{deleted}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
mapper.update:
update announcement set deleted = 1, updated_by = #{updateBy}, updated_at = now() where id in
#{id}
